description: Replace hard-coded plan generation with Gemini 3.1-powered personalized plans, step-by-step session recipes, and adaptive calibration. Enhance assessment flow with richer data collection.

architecture_decisions.decision: Bundled Gemini API key for development phase
architecture_decisions.rationale: Simplifies dev/testing. Move to backend proxy before public distribution.

architecture_decisions.decision: AI generates both plan AND session recipes in a single call
architecture_decisions.rationale: Reduces API calls and ensures coherent plan+recipe alignment. One call per day.
alternatives_considered: Separate calls for plan vs recipes

architecture_decisions.decision: Offline fallback to deterministic math + template recipes
architecture_decisions.rationale: AI enhances but never blocks. No internet = still functional app.

architecture_decisions.decision: System prompt stored as versioned asset file
architecture_decisions.rationale: Easy iteration without code changes. Can A/B test prompt versions.

tasks.title: Expand MemoryProfile model + database schema
tasks.description: Add new fields to MemoryProfile: age (int), expanded AgeGroup enum (7 values), activeDays (List<int>), pacePreference enum, hifzExperience enum. Update SQLite schema with migration for existing profiles (sensible defaults).
acceptance_criteria: AgeGroup enum has 7 values: child, teen, youngAdult, adult, middleAged, senior, elderly
MemoryProfile has: age (int), activeDays (List<int>), pacePreference, hifzExperience fields
PacePreference enum: aggressive, steady, gentle
HifzExperience enum: fresh, resuming, reviewing
SQLite migration adds columns with defaults (age=25, activeDays=[0-6], pace=steady, experience=fresh)
Existing profiles load without crash
toMap() and fromMap() serialize/deserialize all new fields

tasks.title: Enhanced assessment wizard screens
tasks.description: Update the 9-screen assessment wizard to 11 screens. Add: age number input with auto-group mapping, weekly schedule day picker, pace preference selector, prior experience selector. Reorder screens for natural flow.
acceptance_criteria: Screen 2: Age number picker (7-100) with auto-mapped group label shown for confirmation
Screen 3 (NEW): Hifz experience selector (fresh/resuming/reviewing) with descriptions
Screen 8 (NEW): Weekly schedule picker - 7-day grid, tap to toggle active/rest, shows active day count
Screen 9 (UPDATED): Goal + pace preference combined - pace selector (aggressive/steady/gentle) with clear descriptions
Summary screen displays all new fields
Existing assessment flow still works for editing profiles
11 screens total in correct order

tasks.title: Rest days integration across app
tasks.description: Wire activeDays into the rest of the app: PlanProvider skips sabaq on rest days (review-only option), NotificationProvider silences on rest days, MissedDayDialog excludes rest days, timeline calculation accounts for active days/week.
acceptance_criteria: PlanProvider.loadOrGeneratePlan() checks if today is a rest day
Rest days get NO plan or a review-only plan (configurable)
NotificationProvider skips scheduling on rest days
MissedDayDialog does not trigger for rest days
Assessment summary timeline uses activeDays/week in calculation
Dashboard shows 'Rest day' indicator on rest days

tasks.title: AIPlanService + Gemini integration
tasks.description: Create AIPlanService class. Add google_generative_ai package. Implement Gemini 3.1 Flash/Pro API calls with structured JSON output. Build profile context assembler (profile + progress + session history → JSON). Add model switcher in profile settings.
acceptance_criteria: google_generative_ai package added to pubspec.yaml
AIPlanService class with bundled API key
Supports gemini-3.1-flash (default) and gemini-3.1-pro
Profile settings has 'AI Model' toggle (Flash / Pro)
buildUserContext() assembles profile + progress snapshot + last 7 sessions as JSON
generatePlan() calls Gemini and returns parsed response
Structured JSON output schema enforced via response_mime_type
Error handling: timeout, rate limit, invalid response

tasks.title: System prompt design + versioned asset
tasks.description: Craft the comprehensive system prompt and store as a versioned asset file in assets/prompts/. Include: framework rules, age guidelines, traditional method knowledge (from research docs), safety rails, feature inventory, JSON output schema.
acceptance_criteria: assets/prompts/plan_system_prompt_v1.md exists with full prompt
Prompt includes Sabaq/Sabqi/Manzil framework rules
Prompt includes age-group-specific load ceilings and rep ranges
Prompt includes traditional method knowledge: 3×3, Rabt linking, audio-first, visual tracking, overlap, Mauritanian
Prompt includes safety rails: page range 1-604, rep range 1-50, time clamping
Prompt includes strict JSON output schema definition
Prompt loadable from assets at runtime via rootBundle

tasks.title: Plan validation layer + SQLite pipeline
tasks.description: Build the validation layer between AI response and SQLite save. Validate pages (1-604, goal-scoped), clamp reps/time, check required fields, handle malformed responses. Save validated plan to SQLite. Store AI reasoning text.
acceptance_criteria: Validation clamps pages to 1-604 (or goal-specific range for specificJuz/specificSurahs)
Reps clamped to 1-50
Phase times sum <= dailyTimeMinutes
Missing required fields filled with sensible defaults
Malformed JSON response triggers fallback (not crash)
AI reasoning text stored alongside DailyPlan in SQLite
Validated plan saved via HifzDatabaseService.saveDailyPlan()

tasks.title: Offline fallback system
tasks.description: Implement graceful degradation when AI is unavailable. Cache last AI framework params. Fall back to deterministic _getFrameworkParams() math. Generate template recipes from learningPreference. Show offline indicator.
acceptance_criteria: Last successful AI framework params cached in SharedPreferences
AI call failure (no internet, timeout, error) → uses cached params
If no cache → falls back to current PlanGenerationService._getFrameworkParams()
Template-based recipe generation for each learningPreference (4 templates)
Plan card shows '📴 Using offline plan' indicator when in fallback mode
No UI crash or empty state when offline

tasks.title: SessionRecipe model + recipe storage
tasks.description: Create SessionRecipe and RecipeStep data models. Define actions vocabulary. Add SQLite table for recipes (linked to DailyPlan). Implement serialization.
acceptance_criteria: SessionRecipe model: phase, steps[], estimatedMinutes, tips[]
RecipeStep model: stepNumber, action, instruction, target, unit, icon
Actions enum: listen, readAlong, readSolo, reciteMemory, linkPractice, write, reviewMeaning, selfTest
SQLite table 'session_recipes' linked to DailyPlan by planId
toMap()/fromMap() serialization working
Recipes loaded alongside DailyPlan in PlanProvider

tasks.title: Guided session UI — step-by-step view
tasks.description: Redesign SessionScreen from raw rep counter to step-by-step guided view. Show current step instruction, per-step rep target, step progress indicator, prev/next navigation, skip step button. Add 'Free mode' toggle for advanced users.
acceptance_criteria: Session screen shows current step: icon + instruction text + rep target
Per-step rep counter (e.g., '2 / 3') instead of global counter
Step progress indicator (numbered pills or dots)
Previous/Next step navigation buttons
Skip step button (flexibility preserved)
Timer continues across all steps (total phase time visible)
All steps complete → auto-trigger self-assessment
'Free mode' toggle switches back to classic timer + rep counter
Works in both physical and digital mode
Sabqi/manzil phases show assigned page list

tasks.title: Digital mode recipe integration
tasks.description: Sync recipe steps with digital reading canvas. Listen steps auto-play audio. Read solo steps show text. Recite from memory steps hide text. Audio controls context-aware per step.
acceptance_criteria: 'Listen' steps → auto-play audio when step becomes active
'Read solo' steps → show text, pause audio
'Recite from memory' steps → hide/blur text, show blank page prompt
Audio controls (play/pause/seek) context-aware per step type
SessionReadingView responds to step transitions
SessionOverlay shows current step info in digital mode

tasks.title: Plan card enhancement + AI reasoning display
tasks.description: Enhance dashboard PlanCard to show AI reasoning summary (expandable), per-phase time estimates, and recipe preview text.
acceptance_criteria: Plan card shows per-phase time estimates (e.g., 'Sabaq: 25 min')
Expandable 'Why this plan?' section shows AI reasoning text
Recipe preview shown (e.g., 'Listen 3x → Read 3x → Recite 3x')
Graceful when no reasoning (offline plan) — section hidden

tasks.title: Weekly AI calibration + adaptive suggestions
tasks.description: Implement weekly AI calibration trigger. Feed full session history to AI for analysis. Generate adjustment suggestions with reasoning. Surface as SuggestionCards. Include progressive difficulty and smart rest day suggestions.
acceptance_criteria: Weekly calibration triggers after 7 completed sessions
AI receives full week's session history (assessments, times, completion, skips)
AI generates adjustment suggestions with clear reasoning
Suggestions surfaced as SuggestionCard on dashboard
Progressive load increase suggested after 3 consecutive 'strong' assessments
Smart rest day suggestions based on day-of-week patterns

tasks.title: Break recovery plan
tasks.description: Detect 3+ day gap since last session. Trigger AI re-evaluation with 'welcome back' mode. Generate review-first recovery plan with lighter load and compassionate messaging.
acceptance_criteria: Gap of 3+ days detected on app open
AI called with 'recovery mode' flag in context
Recovery plan: review-only for first 2-3 days, then gradual ramp-up
Compassionate messaging: 'Welcome back!' not 'You missed X days'
Dashboard shows recovery plan indicator
After recovery period, normal plan generation resumes

tasks.title: Contextual tips + difficulty prediction
tasks.description: AI generates page-specific tips (mutashabihat alerts, page bridge warnings, notable verses) and difficulty predictions based on content density and user history.
acceptance_criteria: Tips generated per page in plan output
Tips shown at session start and between steps
Difficulty prediction considers: verse count, mutashabihat presence, user past performance
Hard pages get pre-warning: 'This page might take longer'
Recipe targets adjusted for predicted difficulty

tasks.title: Personalized motivational messages
tasks.description: AI generates contextual encouragement: milestone proximity, post-session feedback, streak celebrations. Culturally appropriate with optional hadith/scholar advice.
acceptance_criteria: Milestone approaching messages (e.g., '3 more pages until Juz 29!')
Post-session encouragement based on assessment
Streak celebration messages
Messages culturally appropriate (optional hadith integration)
Messages shown on dashboard and at session completion

security: Gemini API key bundled in app (dev phase only)
Move to backend proxy before public distribution
No user PII sent to AI (only anonymous profile data)
performance: Plan generation should not block app launch (async with loading state)
Offline fallback activates within 1 second of network failure
reliability: AI failures never crash the app or produce empty dashboards
Validation layer catches all malformed AI responses
Cached plan serves as guaranteed fallback

testing_strategy.unit_tests: Validation layer, model serialization, offline fallback logic
testing_strategy.integration_tests: AI call → validate → save pipeline, assessment flow end-to-end
testing_strategy.manual_tests: Session recipe UX on Windows, model comparison (Flash vs Pro)
